nasb.text: So also the Lord directed those who proclaim the gospel to get their living from the gospel.

esv.text: In the same way, the Lord commanded that those who proclaim the gospel should get their living by the gospel.

cnv.text: 主也曾這樣吩咐，叫傳福音的人靠福音為生。

ccb.text: 同样，主也曾吩咐：传福音的人理当借着福音得到生活的供应。

csbs.text: 照样，主也吩咐那些传福音的人，靠福音生活。
